title: Resident Evil 8&4
description: This mod adds a series of monsters, weapons, items, terrains from Resident Evil 8 and Resident Evil 4. It is suitable for adventurous players to explore to their hearts' content!
body:
This mod adds a series of monsters, weapons, items, terrains from Resident Evil 8 and Resident Evil 4. It is suitable for adventurous players to explore to their hearts' content! ### Video Showcase: [Resident Evil 4 0.5](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lR351x3zTns) ### Players can challenge all the bosses and obtain more powerful weapons and equipment by checking the storybook in the mod.
### It is recommended to use Resident Evil Guns in conjunction in 1.16.5~1.19.2 version:
